title: Stress Relief
description: Yoga helps calm the mind and reduce stress.
details: Regular yoga practice lowers cortisol levels and improves mental well-being. Breath control and mindful movements promote deep relaxation.

title: Improve Flexibility
details: Through regular stretching and balance poses, muscles become more flexible and joints gain better range of motion.

title: Weight Balance
details: Dynamic flows improve calorie burn and support metabolic balance.

title: Mental Clarity
details: Meditation and pranayama practices improve attention span and emotional balance.
